This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is made on this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, and Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN 202312345H, with its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048621.

1. Definition of Confidential Information: For the purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall refer to any data or information that is proprietary to either party and not generally known to the public, including but not limited to business strategies, financial information, product designs, and client lists. Confidential Information shall not include data that is publicly available or that becomes publicly available through no fault of the receiving party.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party: The receiving party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the disclosed information and shall not disclose it to any third party without the prior written consent of the disclosing party. The receiving party may only use the Confidential Information for the purpose of evaluating the potential business relationship. Any breach of this Agreement may result in legal action and damages of up to SGD 100,000.

For further inquiries, please contact Mr. Alex Lim at Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd, phone +65 6123 4567, or email alex.lim@quantum.sg.
